detaileddescription.para: Request power up of USB PM.
Stop requesting power up for USB PM.

briefdescription.para: VREGUSB tasks.
VREGUSB events.
VREGUSB interrupts.
STATUS register states.
Power up modes.
Power up target.
Analog signal to be overridden.
Function for activating the specified VREGUSB task.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Task to be activated.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified VREGUSB task register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The specified task.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified task register.

briefdescription.para: Function for clearing the specified VREGUSB event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be cleared.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of the VREGUSB event.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Event to be checked.
The event has been generated.
The event has not been generated.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting the address of the specified event register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
The specified event.

simplesect.para: Address of the specified event register.

briefdescription.para: Function for enabling specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be enabled. Use nrf_vregusb_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for disabling specified interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be disabled. Use nrf_vregusb_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for checking if the specified interrupts are enabled.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Mask of interrupts to be checked. Use nrf_vregusb_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for retrieving the state of pending interrupts.

simplesect.para: States of pending interrupt are saved as a bitmask. One set at particular position means that interrupt for event is pending.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: Bitmask with information about pending interrupts. Use nrf_vregusb_int_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting VREGUSB status register.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

simplesect.para: The STATUS register value. Use nrf_vregusb_status_mask_t values for bit masking.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting time from PM power up to ready signal.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
From 0 (0us) to 48 (3us).

briefdescription.para: Function for getting time from PM power up to ready signal.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting time from VBUSDETRAW until filtered VBUSDET.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
From 0 (0us) to 8000 (500us).

briefdescription.para: Function for getting time from VBUSDETRAW until filtered VBUSDET.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting time from power up LDOs until ready.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
From 0 (0us) to 160 (10us).

briefdescription.para: Function for getting time from power up LDOs until ready.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting time from LDOs ready to SETTLED0v8.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting time from LDOs ready to SETTLED0v8.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting time from SETTLE0v8 to SETTLED3v3.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting time from SETTLE0v8 to SETTLED3v3.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting USB PM internal 1.8V trim.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Current reference trimming value. The value is 35.2mV - 4.4mV steps.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting USB PM internal 1.8V trim.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting 10uA IBP bias current trim.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Trimming value. The value is -2.28uA + 0.285uA steps.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting 10uA IBP bias current trim.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting USB PHY 0.8V DVDD trimming value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Voltage offset trimming value. The value is -160mV + 20mV steps.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting USB PHY 0.8V DVDD trimming value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting USB PHY 3.3V VDD trimming value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Voltage offset trimming value. The value is -528mV + 66mV steps.

briefdescription.para: Function for getting USB PHY 3.3V VDD trimming value.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.

briefdescription.para: Function for locking mirrored registers.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
When true lock is enabled. When false lock is disabled and mirrored registers can be updated at any time.

briefdescription.para: Function for setting power up target configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Power up target.
Mode configuration.

memberdef.argsstring: (NRF_VREGUSB_Type *p_reg, nrf_vregusb_analog_signal_t signal, bool enable, uint8_t val)
memberdef.name: nrf_vregusb_override_set

briefdescription.para: Function for override signal to the analog module.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the structure of registers of the peripheral.
Signal to be overridden.
True to enable override and false to disable.
Override value.

briefdescription.para: Symbol indicating presence of the VBUSDETECTEDRAW event.
Symbol indicating presence of STATUS register.
Symbol indicating presence of CONFIG register.
Symbol indicating presence of MIRROR register.
Symbol indicating presence of OVERRIDE register.
Symbol indicating presence of voltage settling feature.
Symbol indicating presence of power up feature.
Symbol indicating presence of VDD trimming.
Symbol indicating presence of IBP trimming.
Symbol indicating presence of 0V8 trimming.
Symbol indicating presence of 0V8 trimming.
Hardware access layer for managing the USB Voltage Regulator.
